name: Breakfast Ham Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, lightly beat 2 eggs.
2. Add the ham, sausage, bread crumbs, milk, parsley and horseradish to the beaten eggs; mix well.
3. Press the mixture into a greased 6-cup ring mold.
4. Bake at 350°F for 1 1/4 hours.
5. Towards the end of the baking time, prepare scrambled eggs with the remaining eggs, seasoning as desired.
6. Remove the ring from the oven and drain any juices.
7. Unmold the ham mixture into a serving platter.
8. Fill the center with the prepared scrambled eggs.
9. Serve immediately.
